name: Fluffy Gold Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients and add to a mixing bowl.
2. Add shortening and half the milk; mix until combined.
3. Gradually add the remaining milk, vanilla, and egg yolks. Blend well.
4. Pour batter into two greased and floured round layer pans.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30-35 minutes.
